name: slideshot
description: Render HTML slides to high-resolution PNG, WebP, PDF, and PPTX using Puppeteer. Generate carousels for LinkedIn, Instagram, and presentations with a guided AI workflow.
long_description: Slideshot converts HTML into pixel-perfect slide images and documents. Give it HTML with `.slide` divs and it renders each one as a high-resolution PNG, WebP, combined PDF, or editable/image-based PPTX — ready for LinkedIn carousels, Instagram posts, pitch decks, or presentation decks. Includes 8 built-in prompt templates (generic, branded, instagram-carousel, infographic, pitch-deck, dark-modern, editorial, browser-shell) and a guided creation workflow.

tools.name: create_slides
tools.description: Guided slide creation workflow with theme catalog and output presets. step='discover' returns themes + questions; step='preview' renders slide 1 for fast preview.

tools.name: render_html_to_images
tools.description: Render HTML slides to high-resolution PNG, WebP, PDF, and/or PPTX files. Supports native editable PPTX and image-based PPTX modes.

tools.name: get_slide_prompt
tools.description: Get AI prompt template with full CSS + component reference for a theme variant (generic, branded, instagram-carousel, infographic, pitch-deck, dark-modern, editorial, browser-shell).

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Verify Puppeteer/Chromium can launch in this environment. Run first to diagnose render failures.

prompts.name: generic-slides
prompts.description: Clean minimal slide generation prompt with Inter font and white cards

prompts.name: branded-slides
prompts.description: Ketan Slides design system prompt with Space Mono font, teal/coral accents, and corner decorations

prompts.name: instagram-carousel-slides
prompts.description: Bold vibrant Instagram carousel style with Poppins font and gradient backgrounds

prompts.name: infographic-slides
prompts.description: Data-heavy infographic style with DM Sans, progress bars, and stat cards

prompts.name: pitch-deck-slides
prompts.description: Professional pitch deck style with DM Sans, KPI cards, and timelines

prompts.name: dark-modern-slides
prompts.description: Neon glassmorphism style with Inter font and code blocks on dark backgrounds

prompts.name: editorial-slides
prompts.description: Magazine serif style with Playfair Display and gold accents

prompts.name: browser-shell-slides
prompts.description: Browser shell chrome style with Bebas Neue + DM Sans, yellow/navy palette
